---
title: "Create patches"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Introduction

This document introduces the first step of the analysis: defining spatial units for downstream testing. The main challenge is that “patches” do not have to be fixed in advance, so the pipeline should stay flexible enough to accept algorithmic patches, manually drawn regions, domains, or cell neighborhoods.

::: callout-important
**Goals**

-   Build a patch-definition workflow that can use different inputs, including patchDE, SVA, domains, or cell neighborhoods.

-   Compare alternative patching strategies on the two planned datasets, MERFISH MouseColonIBD and CosMx colon cancer.

-   Produce patch-level objects that are ready for differential expression analysis in the next document.
:::
